```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
source("../R/create-reference-Rmd.R")

file_metadata <- read.csv(
  "../metadata/file-metadata.csv",
  fileEncoding = "UTF-8-BOM"
)
column_metadata <- read.csv(
  "../metadata/column-metadata.csv",
  fileEncoding = "UTF-8-BOM"
)
column_category_metadata <- read.csv(
  "../metadata/column-category.csv",
  fileEncoding = "UTF-8-BOM"
)
create_reference_Rmd(
  file_metadata,
  column_metadata,
  column_category_metadata
)
```
